skill_text:
This model was trained by mio using fate recipe in espnet. It is a text-to-speech model that can convert text input into speech output. Framework: ESPnet. Functionality: Text-to-Speech. API call: pipeline('text-to-speech', model='mio/Artoria'). This tool has no required input fields.
When to use:
- Use `espnet__mio_artoria__pipeline_text_to_speech_model_mio_artoria` when the user's request directly matches this tool's purpose.
- This tool has no required input fields.
When not to use:
- Do not call this tool when required inputs are missing or ambiguous.
- Do not invent unsupported parameters or unsupported enum values.
- Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
- Do not use when required inputs are missing.
